div1.entryFree: Rugged, rough, bristling, shaggy: his well proportioned beard made rough and r. H6B III, 2, 175. the r. Russian bear, Mcb. III, 4, 100. the r. Pyrrhus, like the Hyrcanian beast (cf. what follows) Hml. II, 2, 472. Hml. II, 2, 472 Used of looks: sleek o'er your r. looks, Mcb. III, 2, 27 (== disturbed, uneasy).
